title: Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive Through the Municipal Public Information Office and the Municipal Health Office for the Information Dissemination Regarding the Temporary Conversion of Laresio Lakeside Resort and Spa Located at Brgy. Tadlac, Los Baños, Laguna As a Quarantine Facility for Repatriated Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWS), Giving Emphasis on the Program of Operation and the Safety of People Adjacent to the Quarantine Facility. (AUTHOR(S) Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, G
